title: RoleplayProposals
description:
Here's a few lucky items for a lucky few!
 Relations & Relationships & Roleplay
body:
Hey there! Here's a mod to roleplay out relations between 
characters, for roleplay purposes!Craft Rings and put them 
in the box, then the proposed player can right click you 
while holding the ring in order to grab it!

Check out some videos on my other mods!
[https://www.youtube.com/@JTMessenger]

Do not upload this to any other website! This mod was only uploaded to...
- Modrinth
- Curseforge
